reason: The mockup is clean, functional, and fully complies with the design brief. Contrast ratios satisfy WCAG 2.1 AA standards, and visual grouping adheres to Gestalt principles and Miller's Law limits.
concerns: The forms/modals to 'Add accounts' and 'Assign proxies' are not explicitly visualized on this single dashboard view and will require separate UI design definitions during implementation.
The Floating Action Button (FAB) is generic and needs a clear tooltip or context-aware label to specify whether it initiates adding accounts, proxies, or both.
The circular progress segments in the SVG chart are hardcoded using SVG stroke offsets and rotations; these must be dynamically rendered based on real fleet data in the final product.
